Anchor tower to bottom so words build up from foundation

words stack upward — visually builds from the ground up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Dynamic rise distance: each row rises from proportional depth below base

Bottom row rises 40px, top row rises (N-1)*50+40px — words physically
travel from the foundation level up to their final position.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Increase towerRowIn translateY for more dramatic rise from base

60px travel distance makes each row visibly rise up from below
instead of barely-noticeable 20px nudge.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix word placement to build tower from base

Iterate placement loop bottom→top so base rows (wide, appear first in
animation) win ties over observation deck rows. Big/prominent words now
land at the foundation and visibly appear first as the tower builds up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Make tower build animation visibly bottom-to-top

Increase row stagger from 40ms to 100ms and reduce per-row duration
from 500ms to 400ms, making the cascading bottom-to-top build effect
clearly perceivable (~1.1s total for 8 rows).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Extend profanity filter with anatomical and explicit terms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add host_wake_all_slots to pre-warm shadow FX before Song Mode playback

With Link Audio, Move's native track audio routes through shadow slots
for FX processing. When a track goes quiet, the slot idles and skips
rendering. On step transitions, the sudden audio arrival caused glitches
because FX state was stale. Wake all slots at playback start and each
step advance so FX chains run on zeros before audio arrives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

在 preflight_check() 中新增 check_previous_versions_completed()，
掃描所有前版本的 Ticket，若有 pending/in_progress 則阻止版本推進
並提示使用 /ticket migrate 或先完成任務。

Ticket: 0.2.0-W5-002

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix media messages showing Media unavailable

Three bugs caused all media (images, audio, video, documents) to show
Media unavailable:

1. CSP blocking blob: URLs - added blob: to img-src and media-src in
   the Content-Security-Policy meta tag.
2. sanitizeUrl rejecting blob: URLs - added blob: as an allowed protocol
   since blob URLs are same-origin and created from in-memory data.
3. Wrong provider token in multi-device mode - MediaMessage used
   useProvider() (selected device) instead of the providerOverride,
   causing 401 errors when viewing other devices conversations.

Also adds debug warnings in getMediaUrl for easier diagnosis of API
failures, and a Playwright test suite for media message rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: CYBERDECK Phase 1 Week 1 — Capture Agent & Orchestrator Foundation (#1)

Complete Week 1 of CYBERDECK Phase 1 MVP. Rust capture agent (8 modules): packet parser, flow aggregator, graph builder, WebSocket server, wire protocol, enrichment, pcap capture. Node.js orchestrator (4 components): Fastify 5, scope validator, audit logger, Docker tool image. Security hardening: CIDR input validation, hash chain write-before-advance, RwLock scope narrowed, DNS anti-tunneling, all unwrap replaced. 68 tests passing (48 TypeScript + 20 Rust). Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: fuzzy experience deduplication across multiple resume uploads

Exact title+org matching missed variants like:
- "High Performance Computing" vs "High-Performance Computing" (hyphen)
- "LabLink Initiative (Nonprofit)" vs "LabLink Initiative" (parens)
- "Idaho National Laboratory" vs "Idaho National Laboratory (DOE)"

New isSameExperience() normalizes strings (strip parens, hyphens, punctuation)
and also checks org prefix match + containment when dates match exactly.

Also cleaned redpython9's 12 → 9 experience entries (3 dupes removed).

commit.message:
Julia-native improvements: type parameterization, generic solvers, allocation elimination, BGC dispatch

Phase 6 improvements making the codebase GPU-ready and AD-compatible:

1. Float type parameterization ({FT<:AbstractFloat}):
   - All 50+ data structs parameterized on float type
   - Vector{Float64} → Vector{FT}, Matrix{Float64} → Matrix{FT}
   - _init!/_clean! functions extract FT via where {FT}
   - Default construction gives Float64; Float32/Dual supported

2. Generic solvers (tridiagonal, band diagonal, soil water):
   - Type signatures widened from Float64 to <:Real
   - Workspace arrays use promote_type for element type

3. Allocation elimination in hot loops:
   - snow_snicar.jl: ~50 per-column per-band arrays pre-allocated
   - soil_water_movement.jl: 20 per-column arrays pre-allocated
   - photosynthesis.jl: Brent/Newton iteration workspace pre-allocated

4. BGC mode dispatch via type hierarchy:
   - AbstractBGCMode with SPMode, CNMode, FATESMode subtypes
   - CLMDriverConfig parameterized on mode for compiler specialization
   - Backward-compatible getproperty and keyword constructor

All 15,286 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Split add_supplementary_args test to one assert per test

commit.message:
Security hardening: 12 fixes across 4 files

Security:
- Add origin validation to postMessage listener (prevent cross-origin injection)
- Fix migrar.html postMessage target from '*' to joyeros1800.com
- Fix incomplete HTML escaping in error recovery screen (&, ")
- Sanitize sync state label fallback (prevent XSS via state variable)
- Add SRI integrity hash to Chart.js CDN (prevent CDN compromise)
- Fix pitch.html innerHTML XSS in onerror handlers → textContent

Bugs:
- Add null guards on projects[0] in overdue dashboard (prevent crash)
- Guard MIA_FOLLOWUP interval to skip when locked (battery/CPU)
- Update certificate verify URL from github.io to joyeros1800.com

SEO/Accessibility:
- Add canonical URL to index.html
- Add aria-label to WhatsApp nav button
- Add role=navigation to landing page nav

24/24 smoke tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: improve Z (zip) operator with lazy range iteration, * extension, and Z-meta reduction (#802)

- Add ZipIter for index-based iteration over ranges in Z operator,
  avoiding materialization of huge/infinite lists like 1..*
- Support trailing Whatever (*) in Z operands to extend the shorter
  list by repeating its last element
- Handle Z-prefixed meta-operators (e.g. Z+) in reduction context
  so [Z+] works for folding lists element-wise
- Cap Z output at 1000 elements for infinite ranges to prevent hangs
  (TODO: make Z return lazy Seq for full correctness)
- Add local tests in t/zip-operator.t covering lazy ranges, *
  extension, and Z+ reduction

commit.message:
Hide app promo banner when user is already in a mobile app (#109056)

* Hide app promo banner when user is already in a mobile app

The AppPromo component (used on the magic link login screen, among
others) was showing a "Stay logged in with the Jetpack Mobile App"
banner even when the user was already accessing from the Jetpack
mobile app. This adds an early return to skip rendering when
isWpMobileApp() or isWcMobileApp() returns true.

Fixes CMM-1290

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Hide app promo on magic link screen for mobile app OAuth2 clients

Instead of checking user agent (which doesn't work because the mobile
apps use a standard WebView), check the OAuth2 client ID to determine
if the user is logging in from the iOS (client 11) or Android (client
2697) mobile app. When a mobile app client is detected, skip rendering
the "Stay logged in with the Jetpack Mobile App" promo banner on the
check-your-email screen.

The initial magic link request screen already hides the promo when any
oauth2Client is set, so only the check-your-email state needed fixing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Read client_id from query params to detect mobile apps

The mobile app OAuth2 client IDs (11 for iOS, 2697 for Android) are
not in the Redux store's initialClientsData, so getCurrentOAuth2Client
returns null for them. Instead, read client_id directly from the query
params and pass a minimal { id } object to the existing helper
functions. Also gate the second AppPromo render on the initial magic
link request page.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add mobile app client IDs to initialClientsData

Register iOS (11) and Android (2697) OAuth2 client IDs in
initialClientsData so getCurrentOAuth2Client() returns data for them.
This lets the magic login page use the standard oauth2Client prop
instead of manually parsing query params, consistent with how other
OAuth2 client checks work throughout the codebase.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add tests for mobile app OAuth2 client detection

Verify that getCurrentOAuth2Client returns the correct client data
for iOS (client_id=11) and Android (client_id=2697), and that
isIosOAuth2Client / isAndroidOAuth2Client correctly identify them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add comment linking mobile app test chain across test files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  → 分析対象者N=205を汚染する外部リストを自動スキップ
- 補助ファイルのID重複を排除（drop_duplicates）
  → SPPB 230行→205行（25件重複除去）でLEFT JOIN後もN=205を保証
- 体重減少列検索に'6ヵ月の体重減少_0_1'を追加（ヵ=小カ対応）
  → フレイル参加ファイルの列名と一致し体重減少項目が正しく計算される
- バランス能力低下フラグをSPPB'バランス_合計'列にも対応
  → バランス+合計パターンを新たに検索、NaN-aware化（測定なし区別）

safety detection (3 works), planning obligation detection (s106/s278), work-status
awareness (excludes started works), validity windows and coverage metadata.

restrictions, grey dots for minor), fixed play animation speed (600ms/day), fixed

and also fetches Clarissa Sumpter's full profile to find the Wright kids.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix L3 on channel pages (ytd-grid-video-renderer + channelId extraction)

Three root causes why channel /videos pages didn't work:

1. ytd-grid-video-renderer not in selectors — channel pages use this element
   type instead of ytd-rich-item-renderer. Added to querySelectorAll and all
   CSS badge/position selectors.

2. gridVideoRenderer uses shortBylineText for channel info — buildMeta() only
   tried ownerText and longBylineText. Added shortBylineText as third fallback
   so channelId is extracted correctly from channel-page ytInitialData.

3. No page-level channelId fallback — on a channel page, cards often omit
   per-card channel info since it's implied. Added _pageChannelId extracted
   from ytInitialData.header.c4TabbedHeaderRenderer.channelId (and URL
   fallback for /channel/UCxxx paths). getChannelId() uses it as last resort.
   invalidateMetaCache() resets it on SPA navigation.
